title:
AN ACT CREATING BARRIO ANTIPOLO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN ANTONIO, PROVINCE
OF ZAMBALES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1111 / 67 OG No. 37, 7236 (September 13, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6203, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CREATING BARRIO ANTIPOLO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN ANTONIO, PROVINCE

OF ZAMBALES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Antipolo in the Municipality of San Antonio, Province of Zambales, is hereby converted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality, to be known as Barrio Antipolo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
